description_long: This is a classic twin-bell alarm clock with a round black metal body and two prominent black bells on top, connected by a silver hammer. The clock face is white with bold black Arabic numerals and black minute markers, featuring three hands for hours, minutes, and seconds. The front glass cover is clear, protecting the face and hands, while the back has a battery compartment, adjustment knobs, and a switch. The clock stands on two short silver legs and is supported by a flat, circular brown base. The overall design is robust and functional, with a retro aesthetic reminiscent of traditional mechanical alarm clocks. The materials suggest durability and a design intended for easy placement on flat surfaces.
description: A classic black twin-bell alarm clock with a white face, bold black numerals, and a round brown base. It features silver legs, a top hammer, and a functional, retro design.
description_view_0: The front view shows the white clock face with black Arabic numerals, three hands, and the twin bells with a silver hammer on top.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the depth of the clock, the curvature of the bells, and the silver hammer, with the brown base visible below.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the battery compartment, adjustment knobs, and switch, as well as the back of the bells and the brown base.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the clock's thickness, the side profile of the bells, and the supporting base.
attribute_face_design: Circular white face with bold black Arabic numerals, black minute markers, and three central hands, protected by a clear glass cover.
